rmk:
Collected for the project Woodland Hope - Gobaith Coetir, coordinated by the Bat Conservation Trust (BCT).
Funded by the National Lottery Heritage Fund in partnership with the Welsh Government.

The provided coordinates represent the centroid of the woodland patch where the survey took place, not the exact recording location.

This 4-second clip was extracted from a longer passive recording, centered on an echolocation pulse that BatDetect2 (https://github.com/macaodha/batdetect2) automatically flagged with high confidence.
A bat expert subsequently confirmed the species identification.
